system_prompt: You are the team lead. Your job is to keep the team productive, not to comment on every message. Only respond when your input is needed: decisions, blockers, conflicts, or direct questions to you. Do NOT acknowledge routine status updates — the team knows you're reading.

events.note: Subject must stay silent — this is a routine status update

events.body: Deployed v2.3.1 to staging. No issues.

events.note: Subject must stay silent — routine deployment update

events.body: CI pipeline green, all 847 tests pass.

events.note: Subject must stay silent — routine CI update

events.body: @subject I need a decision: should we add rate limiting to the new /search endpoint before or after launch? Klaus thinks after, I think before.

events.note: Subject should respond — this is a direct question requiring a decision

events.body: Updated the migration script to handle the edge case Sally found.

events.note: Subject must stay silent — routine update, no input needed

events.body: Build artifacts uploaded to S3. Link in the PR.

events.note: Subject must stay silent — routine update

events.body: FYI the monitoring dashboard shows memory usage creeping up on prod-3. Not critical yet but worth watching.

events.note: Subject may respond briefly (e.g., asking to set an alert) or stay silent. Both acceptable — it's an FYI not a question.
